title: AddstarMC Official
description:
The AddstarMC Official Vanilla+ Modpack!
Crafted for an enhanced yet authentic Minecraft experience, this modpack is optimised for peak performance while maintaining the core vanilla gameplay you love.
body:
AddstarMC Official Vanilla+ Modpack
-----------------------------------

### Welcome to the AddstarMC Official Vanilla+ Modpack!

Crafted for an enhanced yet authentic Minecraft experience, this modpack is optimised for peak performance while maintaining the core vanilla gameplay you love. It includes a carefully selected array of mods that are fully compatible (and allowed) with our server, ensuring a smooth and immersive adventure. Dive in and discover a richer world with improved features, all while enjoying the stability and community standards of AddstarMC. Happy crafting!

This modpack was created to simplify the process for players who seek better performance but may not know how to add mods or which ones are allowed on our server. By providing a curated selection of performance-enhancing mods, we aim to ensure that every player can enjoy a smoother and more optimized Minecraft experience without the hassle of navigating compatibility issues or server restrictions.


* * *

### Modpack Info:

*   Java 21 Required
*   Recommended Memory: 4GB RAM
*   Minecraft 1.21.11
*   Fabric Loader 0.18.3

### Some of the included Mods:

*   **[AuthMe](https://modrinth.com/mod/auth-me)** _(re-auth without closing Minecraft)_
*   **[Dynamic FPS](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-fps)**
*   **[Iris Shaders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/irisshaders)** (for shaderpacks)
*   **[Krypton](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/krypton)** _(improved network connectivity)_
*   **[Lithium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lithium)**
*   **[Reese's Sodium Options](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/reeses-sodium-options)**
*   **[Sodium Extra](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sodium-extra)**
*   **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)**
*   **[WI Zoom]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom))** _(zoom mod, replaces Optifine zoom)_
